temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) A man with slicked-back hair, wearing glasses, a white collared shirt, and a dark tie, looks down with a stern, intense expression. The scene cuts to another man in a dark suit and a patterned bow tie, who also looks down with a somber and defeated expression. (Storyline: This opening sequence establishes a tense and serious atmosphere, introducing two key characters who appear to be in a state of distress or contemplation.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A faint, tense, and rhythmic ticking sound begins, creating suspense.)
(00:04-00:07) The man in the suit, who has a receding hairline, looks up with a deeply troubled and weary expression. His face is wrinkled with concern as he stares forward, his mouth slightly downturned. (Storyline: This shot continues to build the tension, focusing on the character's emotional turmoil and suggesting he is a central figure in the unfolding drama.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The tense, rhythmic ticking sound continues.)
